bucket.description: Bucket where rendered plans are uploaded.

region.description: S3 signing region; R2 commonly uses auto.

access_key_id.description: Access key ID for the S3-compatible endpoint.

secret_access_key.description: Secret access key for the S3-compatible endpoint.

public_base_url.description: Public base URL used to assemble share links.

key_prefix.description: Prefix prepended to uploaded object keys and remote listings.

template.description: Path to the HTML template used for rendered pages.

no_source.description: Omit uploading the original source alongside rendered output.

indexable.description: Allow search indexing by omitting the noindex robots meta tag.

timeout.description: Whole-invocation timeout as a Go duration or seconds; 0 disables it.

default_profile.description: Profile selected when no explicit profile is set.

profiles.description: Named profiles that inherit and override root-level settings.
